style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white flicker around Arcanine's fur, drifting upward like tiny lightning bolts. A pulsing golden-white aura radiates from its body in concentric rings, intensifying with each movement, while its eyes and tail emit sharp, rhythmic flashes of bright yellow light. The lighting mood is vibrant and energetic, casting dynamic shadows that highlight the bold outlines and soft shading of this clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
